narrative_beat: Overhead pergaminho sobre mesa escura com caligrafia gotica e frase dourada central

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: an aged parchment spread on a dark wooden desk, covered in Gothic calligraphy in faded ink, with one single phrase at center glowing brighter in golden ink than the rest, illuminated by candlelight
subject.focal_point: the golden-glowing phrase at center of the parchment
subject.secondary: Candle at the edge. Wax drips on parchment corners.

environment.atmosphere: official revelation, the confession is in writing

composition.foreground: golden phrase glowing at parchment center
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white desk and scriptorium shadows

lighting.key_light: candle from lower-right casting warm directional light on parchment
lighting.fill_light: golden glow from the highlighted phrase itself

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: revelation in writing, evidence laid bare

symbolism.primary: the written confession — bond markets will hammer rich nations
symbolism.secondary: golden text as truth hiding in plain sight

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
